import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state):
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)

    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)], dtype=jnp.int32)

    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    norm_ay = agent_y / (H_f - 1)
    norm_ax = agent_x / (W_f - 1)
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)

    tile_ids = state.grid[:, :, 0]
    tile_colors = state.grid[:, :, 1]

    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    yy_f = yy.astype(jnp.float32)
    xx_f = xx.astype(jnp.float32)

    # Pocket
    pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0).astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_green_ball = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == 3) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == 2)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pocket_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[0], 13)
    pocket_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[1], 12)

    # Blue pyramid location
    blue_pyr_mask = (tile_ids == 5) & (tile_colors == 3)
    blue_pyr_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    blue_pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_exists = jnp.clip(blue_pyr_count, 0.0, 1.0)

    # Yellow hex location
    yel_hex_mask = (tile_ids == 11) & (tile_colors == 5)
    yel_hex_count = jnp.sum(yel_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yel_hex_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_exists = jnp.clip(yel_hex_count, 0.0, 1.0)

    # Relative vectors (normalized)
    rel_pyr_y = (blue_pyr_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_pyr_x = (blue_pyr_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_pyr = (jnp.abs(blue_pyr_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(blue_pyr_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    rel_hex_y = (yel_hex_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_hex_x = (yel_hex_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_hex = (jnp.abs(yel_hex_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(yel_hex_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # Front tile
    dy_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][0]
    dx_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy_f, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx_f, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(tile_ids[front_y, front_x], 13)
    front_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(tile_colors[front_y, front_x], 12)
    front_is_blue_pyr = ((tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 5) & (tile_colors[front_y, front_x] == 3)).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_floor = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 1).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_closed_door = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 9).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_locked_door = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 8).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_to_hex_dist = (jnp.abs(front_y.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_y) +
                         jnp.abs(front_x.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_x))
    front_adj_hex = (front_to_hex_dist == 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_floor_adj_hex = front_is_floor * front_adj_hex

    # Agent adjacency
    agent_adj_hex = ((jnp.abs(agent_y - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - yel_hex_x)) <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_adj_pyr = ((jnp.abs(agent_y - blue_pyr_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - blue_pyr_x)) <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Task phase
    phase_pickup = (blue_pyr_exists * pocket_empty)
    phase_place = holding_green_ball
    can_place_now = holding_green_ball * front_floor_adj_hex
    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 400.0

    # Doors
    closed_door_mask = (tile_ids == 9)
    locked_door_mask = (tile_ids == 8)
    open_door_mask = (tile_ids == 10)
    all_blockable = closed_door_mask | locked_door_mask
    n_closed = jnp.sum(closed_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_open = jnp.sum(open_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)

    # All 4 doors individually by position on walls
    # In 4-room 13x13: walls at row 6 and col 6, doors somewhere on those walls
    # Find doors in each wall segment
    mid_y = H_f / 2.0
    mid_x = W_f / 2.0

    # Doors on horizontal wall (near row mid_y)
    h_wall_mask = all_blockable & (jnp.abs(yy_f - mid_y) <= 1.0)
    h_wall_count = jnp.sum(h_wall_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    h_wall_door_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * h_wall_mask) / jnp.maximum(h_wall_count, 1.0)
    h_wall_door_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * h_wall_mask) / jnp.maximum(h_wall_count, 1.0)

    # Doors on vertical wall (near col mid_x)
    v_wall_mask = all_blockable & (jnp.abs(xx_f - mid_x) <= 1.0)
    v_wall_count = jnp.sum(v_wall_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    v_wall_door_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * v_wall_mask) / jnp.maximum(v_wall_count, 1.0)
    v_wall_door_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * v_wall_mask) / jnp.maximum(v_wall_count, 1.0)

    # Nearest blockable door to agent
    dist_to_doors = jnp.abs(yy_f - agent_y) + jnp.abs(xx_f - agent_x)
    masked_door_dist = jnp.where(all_blockable, dist_to_doors, 9999.0)
    nearest_door_dist = jnp.min(masked_door_dist)
    nearest_door_flat = jnp.argmin(masked_door_dist)
    nearest_door_y = (nearest_door_flat // W).astype(jnp.float32)
    nearest_door_x = (nearest_door_flat % W).astype(jnp.float32)
    rel_nearest_door_y = (nearest_door_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_nearest_door_x = (nearest_door_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    nearest_door_norm = nearest_door_dist / (H_f + W_f - 2)
    has_blockable_door = (jnp.sum(all_blockable) > 0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Room quadrant
    in_tl = ((agent_y < mid_y) & (agent_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    in_tr = ((agent_y < mid_y) & (agent_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    in_bl = ((agent_y >= mid_y) & (agent_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    in_br = ((agent_y >= mid_y) & (agent_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)

    pyr_in_tl = ((blue_pyr_y < mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_in_tr = ((blue_pyr_y < mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_in_bl = ((blue_pyr_y >= mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    pyr_in_br = ((blue_pyr_y >= mid_y) & (blue_pyr_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)

    hex_in_tl = ((yel_hex_y < mid_y) & (yel_hex_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    hex_in_tr = ((yel_hex_y < mid_y) & (yel_hex_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    hex_in_bl = ((yel_hex_y >= mid_y) & (yel_hex_x < mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)
    hex_in_br = ((yel_hex_y >= mid_y) & (yel_hex_x >= mid_x)).astype(jnp.float32)

    same_room_pyr = in_tl*pyr_in_tl + in_tr*pyr_in_tr + in_bl*pyr_in_bl + in_br*pyr_in_br
    same_room_hex = in_tl*hex_in_tl + in_tr*hex_in_tr + in_bl*hex_in_bl + in_br*hex_in_br

    # === FULL GRID BINARY CHANNELS (key tile types) ===
    # Agent position channel
    agent_channel = ((yy == state.agent.position[0]) & (xx == state.agent.position[1])).astype(jnp.float32).flatten()
    # Blue pyramid channel
    blue_pyr_channel = blue_pyr_mask.astype(jnp.float32).flatten()
    # Yellow hex channel
    yel_hex_channel = yel_hex_mask.astype(jnp.float32).flatten()
    # Closed/locked door channel
    door_channel = all_blockable.astype(jnp.float32).flatten()
    # Open door channel
    open_door_channel = open_door_mask.astype(jnp.float32).flatten()
    # Wall channel
    wall_channel = (tile_ids == 2).astype(jnp.float32).flatten()

    # Floor adjacent to hex (placement targets)
    adj_hex_floor_mask = ((jnp.abs(yy_f - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(xx_f - yel_hex_x)) == 1.0) & (tile_ids == 1)
    adj_hex_count = jnp.sum(adj_hex_floor_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    adj_hex_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * adj_hex_floor_mask) / jnp.maximum(adj_hex_count, 1.0)
    adj_hex_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * adj_hex_floor_mask) / jnp.maximum(adj_hex_count, 1.0)
    rel_adj_hex_y = (adj_hex_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_adj_hex_x = (adj_hex_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_adj_hex = (jnp.abs(adj_hex_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(adj_hex_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # Structured features
    structured = jnp.concatenate([
        # Agent (6)
        jnp.array([norm_ay, norm_ax]),
        dir_oh,

        # Pocket (25 + 3)
        pocket_tile_oh,
        pocket_color_oh,
        jnp.array([pocket_empty, holding_green_ball, phase_pickup]),

        # Blue pyramid (6)
        jnp.array([blue_pyr_y / (H_f-1), blue_pyr_x / (W_f-1),
                   rel_pyr_y, rel_pyr_x, dist_pyr, blue_pyr_exists]),

        # Yellow hex (6)
        jnp.array([yel_hex_y / (H_f-1), yel_hex_x / (W_f-1),
                   rel_hex_y, rel_hex_x, dist_hex, yel_hex_exists]),

        # Placement target (3)
        jnp.array([rel_adj_hex_y, rel_adj_hex_x, dist_adj_hex]),

        # Front tile (25 + 5)
        front_tile_oh,
        front_color_oh,
        jnp.array([front_is_blue_pyr, front_floor_adj_hex, front_is_floor,
                   front_is_closed_door, front_is_locked_door]),

        # Task flags (6)
        jnp.array([agent_adj_hex, agent_adj_pyr, phase_place,
                   can_place_now, n_closed/4.0, n_open/4.0]),

        # Nearest door (4)
        jnp.array([rel_nearest_door_y, rel_nearest_door_x,
                   nearest_door_norm, has_blockable_door]),

        # Room membership (14)
        jnp.array([in_tl, in_tr, in_bl, in_br,
                   pyr_in_tl, pyr_in_tr, pyr_in_bl, pyr_in_br,
                   hex_in_tl, hex_in_tr, hex_in_bl, hex_in_br,
                   same_room_pyr, same_room_hex]),

        # Step (1)
        jnp.array([step_norm]),
    ])
    # 6+28+3+6+6+3+30+6+4+14+1 = 107

    # Binary spatial channels: 6 channels × 169 = 1014 — too many
    # Use 3 most important: agent pos, blue_pyr, yel_hex, doors
    # 4 × 169 = 676 — still too many with structured
    # Use 2 channels: blue_pyr + yel_hex = 338, total = 107+338 = 445 ✓
    # Actually let's do agent + pyr + hex + door = 4*169=676 > 512-107=405
    # So: pyr + hex + door = 3*169 = 507 > 405
    # pyr + hex = 2*169 = 338, total = 445 ✓
    # Add open door too: 3*169=507, total=107+507=614 > 512
    # Stick with: pyr_channel + hex_channel + door_channel = 507, too much
    # Use: pyr + hex = 338, total 445. Plus wall would be 614 too much.
    # Let's do pyr + hex + combined_door (open+closed) 
    # combined_door = (all_blockable | open_door_mask).astype float
    combined_door_channel = (all_blockable | open_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32).flatten()
    # 107 + 3*169 = 107 + 507 = 614 > 512. Too much.
    # Use pyr + hex only: 107 + 338 = 445
    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        structured,           # 107
        blue_pyr_channel,     # 169
        yel_hex_channel,      # 169
    ])
    # Total: 445

    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)
